description: Style Note The salomon Quest 4D GTX boots is a heavy duty hiking shoe that performs well if you're a light/fast to medium hiker. The brand considered its trail-running shoe and used the design for a backpacking boot. A pair for the pros, this shoe provides great arch support and is roomy around the toes (unlike most hiking boots) The USP of this boot is its 4D Advanced Chassis that controls flex, reduces ankle strain, enhances stability and protects feet from rough terrain. The secure heel cupping enhances the stability of the boot and the lateral ankle support renders this pair great for climbing or descending. The shoe exhibits good traction on rocks, sand, landscapes with tree roots and grass  furthermore, the sturdy rubber capping protects the toe against accidental stubbing while in the wild. Bottom line - this is a lightweight boot with excellent stability and support without the typical unwieldiness of hiking shoes. Weighing 649.2 grams, this is great for urban wear as well. Product Details Nylon textile and split suede upper with a high top, has a rubber toe cap and heel guard Heel sling at the heel collar to prevent abrasion High collar that steeps low at the ankle rear with ample padding Padded tongue with a lace-lock, central nylon lace-ups with plastic eyelets and metal hooks Polyester lining to wick sweat away with mesh lining for the collar and tongue upper Waterproof GORE-TEX Extended Comfort membrane at the bootie lines for a dry and comfy feel Removable Ortholite footbed engineered with anti-microbial treatment and is partially made of recycled tire and a molded EVA midsole The 4D Advanced Chassis is made of thermoplastic urethane 4D stands for the four layers - the foam insole, the midsole support plate, a cushioning pad in the sole and the outsole Contagrip outsole made of high wear abrasion resistant rubber which has an ascending lug pattern at the forefoot and braking pattern at the heel region Material and Care Leather, textile Clean with a leather brush Do not store under sunlight or wash

description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNS An absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet. The Nike Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe. Breezy touch to snug shoes With a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot. Adapts to the runner's needs Light in weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the runner’s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer’s stride through each run giving the right amount of support and stability. No wonder overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting this same shoe into a neutral running shoe. Stay safe in the dark The outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions, keeping you safe. Belonging to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+ products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible gauging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes. Upper   Open mesh upper made of synthetic leather for ample breathability  Microfiber synthetic overlays in the forefoot and rearfoot for snug fit  Heel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around rearfoot for stability of the heel  Moulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfort  Midsole  LunarLite technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy return  Dynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronation  Cuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfoot   Outsole   BRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durability  EPR forefoot for multi-surface traction  Waffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioning  Shoe care  Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust  Do not machine wash  Do not store in direct sunlight
